title: Create: Unbreakable Netherite Flint And Steel
description: This mod basically adds a new unbreakable variant of the flint and steel
body:
![Icon of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98025bea9fe26853e96317b45497c21afb079af6.png)
# Create: Unbreakable Netherite Flint And Steel
Lightning up things in minecraft was always a pain when your lightning tool breaks, but this mod simply fixes it by adding a new tool **Unbreakable Flint And Steel**
![Recipe for it](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1523647/description_ecb9bd22-5afe-4868-a1ce-01242d9e6a66.png)

**Curseforge version:** [Link (Click me)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-netherite-flint-and-steel)
